Chimap: Magnetic susceptibility map derived from phase or quantitative susceptibility mapping (QSM) reconstruction
FMW_exrate: Exchange rate map in Free Myelin Water analysis
FW_R1map: Free Water longitudinal relaxation rate (R1) map
FW_R2starmap: Free Water effective transverse relaxation rate (R2*) map
FW_T1map: Free Water longitudinal relaxation time (T1) map
FitMask: Mask indicating voxels with successful quantitative parameter fitting
M0map: Proton density (M0) map derived from GRE or similar acquisitions
M0map_S0: Proton density map derived from multi-echo VFA T1 mapping (S0)
M0map_echo1: Proton density map from first echo of GRE sequence
MP2RAGE_T1w: T1-weighted MP2RAGE image generated from the MP2RAGE sequence
MWFmap: Myelin water fraction map estimated from multi-echo data
MW_R2starmap: Myelin Water effective transverse relaxation rate (R2*) map
S0map: Signal extrapolated to TE = 0 from multi-echo imaging
TB1map_GRE: Transmit field (B1+) map derived from a GRE-based B1 mapping sequence
TB1map_anat: Anatomical image that comes with the transmit field (B1+) map
TB1map_angle: Flip angle map from transmit B1+ field mapping
echos4Dmag: 4D magnitude image stack from a multi-echo GRE acquisition
echos4Dphase: 4D phase image stack from a multi-echo GRE acquisition
fieldmap: B0 field map representing static magnetic field inhomogeneities
localfmask: Local field mask for susceptibility mapping
meanChimap: Mean susceptibility (QSM) map across echoes or repetitions
meanR2starmap: Mean R2* map averaged across repeats or echoes
rawINV1: Raw magnitude image of the first MP2RAGE inversion before processing
rawINV2: Raw magnitude image of the second MP2RAGE inversion before processing
rawMEGRE: Raw multi-echo gradient echo images before processing
rawMEVFA: Raw multi-echo variable flip angle (VFA) data before processing
rawTB1map_anat: Raw anatomical B1+ mapping data before processing
rawTB1map_famp: Raw flip angle map from B1+ mapping before processing
rawUNIT1: Raw uniform T1-weighted image from MP2RAGE before processing
syntheticT1: Synthetic T1-weighted image calculated from quantitative maps
unwrapped: Phase-unwrapped multi-echo phase image used for QSM or fieldmap estimation
